scripts.install:all: npm install && npm run db:generate --prefix backend
scripts.dev: concurrently -n "api,worker,web,ext" -c "cyan,magenta,green,yellow" "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev:worker --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend" "npm run dev --prefix extension"
scripts.build:all: npm run build --prefix backend && npm run build --prefix frontend && npm run build --prefix extension
scripts.start:all: concurrently -n "api,worker,web" -c "cyan,magenta,green" "node backend/dist/index.js" "node backend/dist/workers/worker.js" "npm run start --prefix frontend"
